questionHtml:
What is the role of type II pneumocytes?

A. To carry out gas exchange

B. To keep the alveoli moist

C. To increase surface tension

D. To maintain partial pressures of gases

meta.title: What is the role of type II pneumocytes? A. To carry out gas exchange B. To keep the alveoli moist C. To increase surface tension D. To maintain partial pressures of gases
